mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password_hash, role FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT id, email, password_hash, role FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, email, password_hash, role FROM users WHERE role = #{role} ORDER BY id LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, role) VALUES (#{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{role})
